div.head: The Ambassador in Venezuela (Corrigan) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 163. For BonsalPhilip W. Bonsal, Chief, Division of the American Republics. from Thornburg. New petroleum law progressing along basic lines agreed upon in December and according to present plans will be presented to special session about February 22.For text of petroleum law approved by Venezuelan Congress on March 13, 1943, see Ley de hidroearburos, Gaceta Oficial, Caracas, March 13, 1943 (núm. 31 extraordinario). As to detail there has been considerable sharp shooting by subordinates principally on Government side. This has resulted in part from President Medina’s decision to refer draft to semi-public commission for criticism before presentation to Congress. This action no doubt strengthened his hand politically but at some cost in technical quality of resulting draft.
I shall have final conversation with President Friday at which I expect refining question to be disposed of satisfactorily. Shall leave here Saturday morning arriving Washington Sunday.
Memorandum on Mexico leaving by courier Thursday morning. [Thornburg.]
